claim: Per-topic narrative files (atoms-operator.md, atoms-substrate.md, atoms-discipline.md, atoms-check.md) shall be generated from SETTLED requirements grouped by topic, written into the active domain's docs/gen/ by the Go generator.
why: Director asked: build a system that generates topic-grouped descriptions in the docs folder. BUILD: this phase. The Go generator (internal/generator/atoms.go) groups SETTLED requirements by topic predicate via selectSettled and renders each group through renderAtoms, producing four atoms-*.md files written into domains/<name>/docs/gen/ by cmd/hotam/gen_spec.go (the Go port writes them per-domain under docs/gen/ rather than at the repo-root docs/methodology/atoms/ as the Python reference did — the content is the same, the layout differs). (Wave 1 seed-coherence pass: enforced_by's second entry previously named a tool source path 'tools/gen_spec.py::build_methodology_atoms' rather than a test — corrected; the requirement stands at PROSE in the Go port since no dedicated Test* guards the atoms builders, though TestGenerator_DoubleRegenerateIsIdentical exercises them for determinism.)
